nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template for environment variables used by the RPGlitch engine.

nodes.name: .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc
nodes.summary: Configuration file for the markdownlint-cli2 tool, defining glob patterns and rule overrides.

nodes.name: .markdownlint.json
nodes.summary: Configuration file for markdownlint, specifying formatting rules for Markdown files.

nodes.name: DESIGN.md
nodes.summary: The single source of truth for user-facing application design, detailing the Chalk Regime color palettes, typography, and layout rules.

nodes.name: GEMINI.md
nodes.summary: Sovereign rules and foundations document outlining agent protocols, rules, and system boundaries.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview documentation providing quick start instructions, architecture details, and technical stack information.

nodes.name: ignores.master.json
nodes.summary: Master ignore configuration for various tools including git, linting utilities, and Visual Studio Code.

nodes.name: jsconfig.json
nodes.summary: JavaScript configuration file defining compiler options and path aliases for the project.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest containing metadata, dependencies, scripts, and package manager overrides.

nodes.name: setup.sh
nodes.summary: Initialization script to prime the environment for development, verify dependencies, and build the project.

nodes.name: skills-lock.json
nodes.summary: Lockfile detailing sources and versions of skills used in the agentic toolkit.
